sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n995" key="a)gx" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="pref" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγχ-</orth>, Poet.abbrev. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀναχ-</foreign> in compds. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀνά</foreign> with words beginning with <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χ.</foreign> </entryFree>
